metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_9
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Immunogold labeling shows localisation close to the presynaptic plasmamembrane and in the cytosol. Since it is a channel its expected location is in the membrane.

5/12/2016 Pim:
- integral component in the annotation is derived from TM-domains in the annotated protein.
- Literal excerpt: "Gold particles (5 nm in diameter) are localized in the presynaptic terminal close to the presynaptic plasma membrane (arrowhead) and within the cytoplasm of the PF synapse (arrow)" [5/12/2016 Pim]
- Fig 3b shows presynaptic localization in the **mouse** by using a biochemical approach. This annotation was omitted for now.. Experimental description: Results: "In immunoelectron microscopy images on **rat** cerebellum using a well-characterized anti-K V 10.1 antibody (mAb62; Hemmerlein et al. 2006; Martin et al. 2008; G ' omez-Varela et al. 2010) K V 10.1 was preferentially localized to the synapses of the parallel fibres onto the Purkinje cell spines (Fig. 3 A )."

checks.label: OWL Consistency
checks.error_message: No inferences attributed to this model graph in the materializer output. Likely a parse failure or other materializer skip — re-run on this model alone to investigate.
